title: Dr. Fatemeh Hashemi Rafsanjani - Iran's Role in the New Silk Road Strategy in the 3rd Millennium
description:
Address by Dr. Fatemeh Hashemi Rafsanjani, President of WSA (Women Solidarity Association), Teheran, Islamic Republic of Iran.

30th Anniversary Conference of the Schiller Institute, October 18-19, 2014, Frankfurt/Main, Germany
